# SpecifyJS

> A declarative TypeScript UI framework built for performance, browser compatibility, and developer simplicity. Zero runtime dependencies. 4KB gzipped core.

## Website: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com
## Repository: https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs
## npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@asymmetric-effort/specifyjs

## Documentation

- 3d-space-demo: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/3d-space-demo
- accessibility: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/accessibility
- async-computation: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/async-computation
- browser-support: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/browser-support
- building-spas: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/building-spas
- code-splitting: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/code-splitting
- concurrent-rendering: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/concurrent-rendering
- core-concepts: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/core-concepts
- custom-hooks: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/custom-hooks
- deployment: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/deployment

- feature-flags: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/feature-flags
- forms-and-validation: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/forms-and-validation

- meta-tags: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/meta-tags
- migrating-from-react: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/migrating-from-react
- performance: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/performance
- production-builds: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/production-builds
- render-safety: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/render-safety
- routing: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/routing

- state-management: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/state-management
- styling: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/guides/styling

## API Reference

- README: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/api/README
- components: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/api/components
- compute: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/api/compute
- dom: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/api/dom
- hooks: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/api/hooks
- math: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/api/math
- server: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/api/server
- types: https://specifyjs.asymmetric-effort.com/#/docs/api/types

## Install

```
npm install @asymmetric-effort/specifyjs
```
